description: A non-existing [[Control]]. To compare non-existent objects use [[isNull]] or [[isEqualTo]] (see examples).
examples: <sqf>if (_myCtrl isEqualTo controlNull) then { hint "_myCtrl is null!"; };</sqf>

<sqf>
controlNull == controlNull;			// returns false
isNull controlNull;						// returns true
controlNull isEqualTo controlNull;		// returns true
</sqf>
name: controlNull
